titleStmt.title: SII 37.259: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 259. (A.R. No. B 365 of 1940-41.) Bōḍitippanapādu, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying in a field about 1(1/2) km North-West of the village.
This is dated in the cyclic year Yuva, Bhādrapada, ba. 2, Friday. On the basis of palaeography this may be assigned to 17th century A.D.

It registers a grant of mānya land at Pālūru-agrahāra made by Tipā-Nāyaniṅgāru, son of Naravula Pedagangi Nāyaniṅgaru to Kambhasūtram Timmābattūḍu, son of Bukkapatṭnam Peddōju. It also states that Vīra Narasingarāya Mahārāya gave the village to the donor as nāyaṅkara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . yuva saṁvatsara bādra
pada ba 2 śu śrīmatu naṟavula pedagaṁ
gināyaniṁgāri komāruḍu tipānā
yaniṁgāru bukapaṭṇaṁ pedōju koḍuku kaṁ
bhasūtraṁ timmābattuniki yiccina mānyaṁ .
paṭamā nāyaṁkrānaku vīranarasiṁharā
ya mahārāyalu pāliṁcina pālūri [Agrahā]
rānanu nīku mānyaṁ peṭina cēnu guṁḍanakuṁṭatrōva
pedanāgaṇōjulu dunina ma bīḍu nānu nīku
peṭina mānyaṁ ce khaṁ . Akṣarālānu paṁduṁcēnu
Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāyi Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyaṁlā
nu Anubha ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ
Digital edition of SII 37.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
